remaining_targets.reason: The L=32 float64 GPU eigensolver hit an underlying 32-bit workspace limitation. At L=38, the dense Hamiltonian and eigenvector matrices alone total about 48 GB before eigensolver workspace, beyond the practical path of the available single A100.
remaining_targets.reopen_condition: A 256 GB+ memory node, distributed eigensolver, or suitable multi-GPU large-memory resource becomes available.

remaining_targets.target: Full T and randomized-site n operator panels
remaining_targets.reason: The completed remote campaign covers T_s; the remaining operator panels require both runner extension and another paper-scale compute window.

proxy_policy: Do not substitute reduced-size or proxy results for the missing paper-size targets.
